questoes.pergunta: Choose the correct article: '_____ apple a day keeps the doctor away.'
questoes.explicacao: 'Apple' starts with a vowel sound → an.

questoes.pergunta: Choose the correct article: 'She is _____ teacher.'
questoes.explicacao: 'Teacher' starts with a consonant sound → a.

questoes.pergunta: Choose the correct article: 'He is _____ honest man.'
questoes.explicacao: 'Honest' starts with a vowel sound (h is silent) → an.

questoes.pergunta: Choose the correct article: 'I have _____ umbrella.'
questoes.explicacao: 'Umbrella' starts with a vowel sound → an.

questoes.pergunta: Choose the correct article: 'They live in _____ house.'
questoes.explicacao: 'House' starts with a consonant sound → a.

questoes.pergunta: Choose the correct article: 'She is _____ university student.'
questoes.explicacao: 'University' starts with a consonant sound (y sound) → a.

questoes.pergunta: Choose the correct article: 'He is _____ European.'
questoes.explicacao: 'European' starts with a consonant sound (y sound) → a.

questoes.pergunta: Choose the correct article: 'I need _____ hour to finish.'
questoes.explicacao: 'Hour' starts with a vowel sound (h is silent) → an.

questoes.pergunta: Choose the correct article: '_____ sun is shining.'
Choose the correct article: 'She plays _____ piano.'
Choose the correct article: 'I like _____ chocolate.' (in general)
questoes.explicacao: Uncountable nouns in general take no article.

questoes.pergunta: Choose the correct article: 'She is _____ best student in the class.'
Choose the correct article: 'I have _____ dog and _____ cat.'
questoes.explicacao: First mention → a dog, a cat.

questoes.pergunta: Choose the correct article: '_____ dog I have is very friendly.' (specific)
Choose the correct article: 'I went to _____ school yesterday.' (as a place)
Choose the correct article: 'Children go to _____ school to learn.' (in general)
Choose the correct article: 'She is in _____ hospital.' (as a patient)
questoes.explicacao: In hospital (British) for being a patient. In American English, 'in the hospital' is more common. But many tests accept no article.

questoes.pergunta: Choose the correct article: 'I work in _____ office.'
Choose the correct article: '_____ moon is full tonight.'
Choose the correct article: 'She has _____ interesting job.'
Choose the correct article: 'He is _____ only person I trust.'
Choose the correct article: 'I usually have _____ breakfast at 8.'
questoes.explicacao: Meals in general take no article.

questoes.pergunta: Choose the correct article: 'The breakfast I had was delicious.' (specific)
Choose the correct article: 'She is _____ architect.'
Choose the correct article: 'He is _____ M.D.' (Medical Doctor)
questoes.explicacao: M.D. starts with a consonant sound (em) → a. But actually 'M' is pronounced 'em' which is a vowel sound. Wait, 'em' starts with e, so it's a vowel sound. This is tricky. Many say 'an M.D.' because M is pronounced with a vowel sound. Let's check: an M.D. is correct.

questoes.pergunta: Choose the correct article: 'She has _____ one-year-old daughter.'
questoes.explicacao: 'One' starts with a consonant sound (w) → a.

questoes.pergunta: Choose the correct article: 'I need _____ new car.'
Choose the correct article: '_____ President of the United States lives in the White House.'
Choose the correct article: 'She wants to be _____ president one day.' (in general)
Choose the correct article: 'I live in _____ United States.'
Choose the correct article: 'I live in _____ Brazil.'
Choose the correct article: 'She went to _____ cinema last night.'
Choose the correct article: 'I listen to _____ radio every morning.'
Choose the correct article: 'I watch _____ television every night.'
Choose the correct article: 'She is _____ best friend.'
Choose the correct article: 'I have _____ idea!'
questoes.explicacao: Idea starts with vowel sound → an.

questoes.pergunta: Choose the correct article: 'He is _____ honest person.'
questoes.explicacao: Honest starts with vowel sound → an.

questoes.pergunta: Choose the correct article: 'She gave me _____ useful book.'
questoes.explicacao: Useful starts with consonant sound (y) → a.

questoes.pergunta: Choose the correct article: 'I saw _____ UFO last night.'
questoes.explicacao: UFO starts with consonant sound (yoo) → a.

questoes.pergunta: Choose the correct article: 'She is _____ actress.'
questoes.explicacao: Actress starts with vowel sound → an.

questoes.pergunta: Choose the correct article: 'I need _____ advice.' (in general)
questoes.explicacao: Advice is uncountable, no article in general.

questoes.pergunta: Choose the correct article: 'The advice you gave me was good.' (specific)
Choose the correct article: 'I have _____ information for you.'
Choose the correct article: 'She is _____ good student.'
Choose the correct article: 'He is _____ excellent teacher.'
questoes.explicacao: Excellent starts with vowel sound → an.

questoes.pergunta: Choose the correct article: 'I went to _____ church on Sunday.' (as a place of worship)
questoes.explicacao: Go to church (no article) for the activity.

questoes.pergunta: Choose the correct article: 'I went to _____ church to see the paintings.' (building)
Choose the correct article: 'She plays _____ guitar beautifully.'
Choose the correct article: 'I have _____ cold.'
Choose the correct article: 'She is in _____ hurry.'
